issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for test failures.
The skill includes verbose comments and explanations that could be trimmed.

scenarios.name: basic-relevancy-faithfulness-test
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets the rubric requirements (LLMTestCase, metrics, assert_test) with only a minor threshold deviation, while Response A fails to use the required classes and metrics.

scenarios.name: custom-brand-voice-metric-test
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B does not implement the required GPTModel-based measure or the specified test case structure.
